prose:
The Fukui reactivity of ferrocene was computed using GFN2-xTB (XT B semiempirical tight-binding) in the gas phase at charge 0, multiplicity 1. A single-point Fukui analysis was performed on the user-supplied geometry (`ferrocene.xyz`), yielding the maximum electrophilic Fukui index (f₊) of 0.22885456 at the iron center (atom 11). SCF converged successfully with no warnings reported. The calculation was run via:

`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method xtb --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2o6t3orl/live.json`

Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2o6t3orl/live.json`
Fukui plot: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/argo_o4-mini/20260703-193701_ferrocene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
